name: Zymergen Inc.
description: Zymergen Inc. was an American biotechnology company that integrated biology, machine learning, and automation to design, develop, and commercialize bio-based products. By leveraging genomics and computational technologies, the company aimed to create innovative materials for various sectors, including electronics, agriculture, and healthcare. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Emeryville, California, Zymergen focused on engineering microbes to produce novel chemicals and materials. In 2022, the company was acquired by Ginkgo Bioworks, marking a significant consolidation in the synthetic biology industry as it sought to scale its bio-manufacturing capabilities and research platforms.
